on_level2_load: ^"Alright, we's gotta save some more of our friends- but be careful not to wake them sleepin trolls!"
get_key: ^"Ah you found a key, you can use that to free a gnome from their cage now."

b: ^"Darn, it looks locked- maybe there's a key around here that opens it."
^"My savior! You rescued me, so let me join you! You can pick me up and throw me to reach higher places. Just press E."

end_of_level: ^"Nice job guy, let's take a break and recoup at the shed. We can save s'more in the mornin."
